data.title: Alliance Resource Partners, L.P. Completes $206 Million Acquisition of Oil & Gas Mineral Interests
data.description: Alliance Resource Partners, L.P., based in Tulsa, Oklahoma, has successfully finalized the acquisition of oil and gas mineral interests for a sum of $206 million. The completion of this acquisition marks a significant investment for the company, further expanding its portfolio and solidifying its position in the industry.

data.title: Dole plc Announces Strategic Acquisition in the Nordic Region
data.description: Dole plc (DOLE) revealed the completion of its subsidiary Dole Nordic AB's acquisition of Greenfood AB’s Fresh Produce division (GFP), bolstering its presence in Sweden, Finland, and the broader Nordic area. The acquisition includes a new 26,500 m² fresh produce distribution center in Helsingborg, Sweden. This move provides Dole with enhanced scale and capabilities in the region and offers a solid foundation for future investments in next-generation warehouse technology.

data.title: New Nature Biotechnology Article Highlights the Need for Cell-Cell Interaction Data in AI Biology
data.description: Partillion Bioscience recently discussed their latest research demonstrating the Nanovial technology's effectiveness as a facilitator for large-scale functional cell-cell interaction datasets. The study was covered in a recent perspective article in Nature Biotechnology by scientists from UCLA. The article sheds light on the significant potential of Nanovial technology in this field. Los Angeles was the location of the research which took place on July 2, 2026.

data.title: Invivyd Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On July 1, 2026, Invivyd, Inc. (Nasdaq: IVVD) based in New Haven, Conn., disclosed that they provided 14 recently recruited non-executive staff members with options to buy a total of 493,000 shares of the company's common stock. Each option was granted as a significant incentive for the new employees to join Invivyd. This action was taken following Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) and under the Invivyd, Inc. 2026 Inducement Plan.

data.title: Sitemetric Launches the First Agentic AI for Integrated Construction Site Access Control and Monitoring
data.description: The latest platform, Sitemetric AI, allows customers to conveniently access reports on their devices. With this technology, individuals can view data, insights, and adjust access control settings through an easy-to-use chat interface. By integrating smart turnstiles, worker badges, AI cameras, and site sensors, Sitemetric AI streamlines operations and enhances security measures. Users can now utilize this innovative solution to manage their facilities more efficiently and effectively.

data.title: Cartesian Therapeutics Announces New Employment Inducement Grants
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Cartesian Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: RNAC) disclosed awarding eight new employees with stock options. The options allow the purchase of a total of 238,700 shares at $10.18 per share, which was the closing price on the grant date. These inducement awards were granted under the Amended and Restated 2018 Employment Inducement Incentive Award Plan and approved by the board of directors. Vesting of the options begins with 25% on July 1, 2027, followed by equal monthly installments over thirty-six months, ensuring full vesting by July 1, 2030. These options, granted under Rule 5635(c)(4) of the Nasdaq Listing Rules, aim to attract top talent and were deemed essential for the new employees’ recruitment.

data.title: Pet Treats Market worth $58.71 billion by 2031- Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report from MarketsandMarkets™ predicts significant growth in the pet treats market. The market, currently valued at USD 38.40 billion in 2026, is projected to reach USD 58.71 billion by 2031, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.9%. This growth trend is expected to continue from 2022 to 2031.

data.title: Telesat donates satellite capacity to support Venezuela’s recovery efforts
data.description: Telesat GEO Inc., a subsidiary of Telesat Corporation (TSX: TSAT), a major satellite operator, revealed today that they are providing high-power satellite capacity to Top Comunications, a prominent Venezuelan telecommunications firm. The donated satellite capacity aims to aid in the disaster recovery operations in Venezuela after the recent destructive earthquakes.

data.title: VERAXA Biotech Initiates Cell Line Development with ATUM to Advance its Lead BiTAC®-TCE Program
data.description: VERAXA Biotech has reported continued advancement in their primary BiTAC® T-cell engager (BiTAC-TCE) program, as they have commenced cell line development in collaboration with ATUM. This development marks a significant step forward in the project, with the company aiming to leverage this progress to further enhance their research and innovation capabilities.

data.title: BioCryst Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: BioCryst Pharmaceuticals, Inc. revealed that the compensation committee of its board of directors has provided nine incoming employees with stock options to acquire a total of 33,950 shares, alongside restricted stock units (RSUs) for a total of 91,750 shares of BioCryst common stock. This grant, given on July 1, 2026, was deemed essential to attract these new employees. The allocation of options and RSUs adhered to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Vireo Growth Inc. expands into 11th state with Pennsylvania dispensary license acquisition.
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that over 1,000 new cases of COVID-19 have been confirmed in the past 24 hours. This surge brings the total number of cases in the country to more than 50,000. Additionally, there have been 15 new deaths reported, bringing the total death toll to 2,500. Health officials are urging the public to continue practicing safety measures such as wearing masks and social distancing to help curb the spread of the virus. In response to the current situation, authorities are considering implementing stricter lockdown measures in highly affected areas.
MTY Food Group to discuss Q2 2026 results in conference call.

data.title: IREN Appoints Chief Product Officer and Chief Development Officer
data.description: On July 2, 2026, IREN Limited (NASDAQ: IREN) revealed the hiring of Kambiz Aghili as Chief Product Officer and Michael Nudelman as Chief Development Officer.

data.title: Akamai Technologies schedules Q2 2026 investor call for Aug 6, 4:30 PM ET.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 6.2%, which is the highest recorded level in the past five years. The number of job losses in the last month alone amounted to 250,000, with a significant impact on the service industry. Additionally, the GDP growth forecast for the next quarter has been revised downward to 2.5%, reflecting the economic challenges faced by the nation. The government has announced plans to introduce new stimulus measures to address the rising unemployment and boost the economy.
